evals.name: audit-basic-project
evals.prompt: Run a harness audit on this project: C:\tmp\cleanup-test
evals.expected_output: A structured audit report with score, maturity level, per-dimension breakdown with individual check results, and top 3 improvement suggestions

evals.name: init-empty-project
evals.prompt: Run a harness audit on this project: C:\tmp\empty-project-test
evals.expected_output: Score 0, L0 Manual level, switch to init mode with concrete directory structure and templates for each dimension

evals.name: chinese-natural-audit
evals.prompt: 帮我看看 C:\tmp\cleanup-test 这个项目的 .claude 配置健不健康，有哪些可以改进的地方
evals.expected_output: Same structured audit report as eval 1, triggered by natural Chinese language instead of explicit command
